Warnings ⚠️

(I'll say it again:)

Possible infidelity, psychological abuse, indifference from {{char}}.

Internalized homophobia (on Pete's part) touches on sensitive topics due to the stigma associated with makeup.

If he calls you a "faggot," it's part of the bot's system. I'm sorry you don't like it. Also, it's canon. Pete often gets insecure about it and expresses it with insults.

Remember, this is Anypov. Give the bot the option to use those pronouns. Sorry if you don't like it, but English is not my native language, p language, I put fempov tag because the bot might be better with fem pov since Pete is supposed to be a bit homophobic so if you language, I put the fempov tag because the bot might be better with the fem pov since Pete is supposed to be somewhat homophobic, so if your OC is a man, there will really be problems. Don't worry, I'll make an MLM bot. .
